title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 8.910 - Alex M. Petrovic Reading Room designated at a building of the Missouri State Archives
text:
8.910.  Alex M. Petrovic Reading Room designated at a building of the Missouri State Archives. — The secretary of state shall designate a reading room in one of the buildings comprising the Missouri state archives as the "Alex M. Petrovic Reading Room" in honor and recognition of Missouri state representative Alex M. Petrovic who introduced House Bill No. 294 in the seventy-third general assembly which, upon its passage and approval, established the division of records management and archives services in the secretary of state's office and created the Missouri state archives.
(L. 2005 H.B. 219)
